# Extração: 12- Endings

- **Fonte:** 12- Endings.pdf
- **Tipo:** PDF
- **Páginas:** 0
- **Tamanho:** 0.02 MB

---

Landing your story with a satisfying ending is critical.
Your audience has invested time and attention in your story, so they expect an
ending that rewards that investment.
This lesson helps ensure that you end your stories in a way that pleases your
audience.
